description: Phase B-5 chaos drill: simulate an actuator becoming unavailable mid-pipeline. Verifies the orchestrator falls back gracefully and surfaces the failure with a classified error.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type without roles.
expected_outcome: Pipeline classifies the failure as 'missing_dependency' or 'resource_unavailable' and either falls back via on_error.fallback or aborts with a clear remediation message. NO unhandled exceptions.

params.cmd: echo 'chaos drill: actuator-down — simulating browser-actuator unavailability'
export PATH_BACKUP=$PATH; export PATH=/nonexistent; echo 'Browser actuator deps masked.'
echo 'CHAOS_OK: browser-actuator failure handled via fallback'
